hooks.prompt: Review the changes made in this session. Determine if README.md or documentation needs updating. Only block for MAJOR changes: new user-facing features, killer features, breaking changes to public API, or removal of major functionality. Do NOT block for: bug fixes, refactoring, minor UI tweaks, internal improvements, config changes, dependency updates, test changes, or incremental enhancements to existing features. When in doubt, approve. If updates are needed, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "README update recommended: [what major feature/change to document]"}. Otherwise respond {"ok": true}.
